args.query: SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS n_days, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Close" AS DOUBLE) > CAST("Open" AS DOUBLE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Close" AS DOUBLE) < CAST("Open" AS DOUBLE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS n_days, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Close" AS DOUBLE) > CAST("Open" AS DOUBLE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Close" AS DOUBLE) < CAST("Open" AS DOUBLE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01' GROUP BY "Index";

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_IE1OMiMySCscoP7KeJh0ch9f)
# cast
for c in ['n_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c]=pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices mapping inferred
north_america = {
    'NYA': 'New York Stock Exchange (NYSE Composite)',
    'IXIC': 'NASDAQ (NASDAQ Composite)',
    'GSPTSE': 'Toronto Stock Exchange (S&P/TSX Composite)'
}

df_na = df[df['Index'].isin(north_america.keys())].copy()
df_na['name']=df_na['Index'].map(north_america)
df_na['more_up_than_down'] = df_na['up_days'] > df_na['down_days']

res = df_na[df_na['more_up_than_down']][['Index','name','up_days','down_days']].sort_values('Index').to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))

import json
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_IE1OMiMySCscoP7KeJh0ch9f)
# cast
for c in ['n_days','up_days','down_days']:
    df[c]=pd.to_numeric(df[c])

# North America indices mapping inferred
north_america = {
    'NYA': 'New York Stock Exchange (NYSE Composite)',
    'IXIC': 'NASDAQ (NASDAQ Composite)',
    'GSPTSE': 'Toronto Stock Exchange (S&P/TSX Composite)'
}

df_na = df[df['Index'].isin(north_america.keys())].copy()
df_na['name']=df_na['Index'].map(north_america)
df_na['more_up_than_down'] = df_na['up_days'] > df_na['down_days']

res = df_na[df_na['more_up_than_down']][['Index','name','up_days','down_days']].sort_values('Index').to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))
